title: na`ar #5287
definition:
1) to shake, shake out or off
    1a) (Qal) to shake out, show emptiness
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be shaken
        1b2) to shake oneself
    1c) (Piel) to shake off or out
    1d) (Hithpael) to shake oneself
